q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is parcel_path.read_text(), a local file read with no network I/O, shell execution, or irreversible side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The file content read by the tainted path is placed into the HttpResponse returned to the caller.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' with exprs including HttpResponse(data, content_type='text/plain'), where data is the result of the tainted read.
